_note: Fixture for eval 1 — Feature with no Proposed Tasks checklist whose ACs clearly imply a database schema migration. The skill must derive the task list from ACs and place the migration task first.

feature.title: Feature: Track settlement processing fees
feature.body:
## Goal
Allow the system to record and expose the processing fee charged for each settlement so that merchants can reconcile costs accurately.

## Bounded Context
Settlement

## User Stories
- As a Merchant, I want to see the processing fee for each settlement so that I can match it against my payment provider invoice.

## Acceptance Criteria
- AC1: The settlement record includes a processing fee amount stored persistently (requires a new `fee` column on the settlements table).
- AC2: The fee is calculated automatically from the settlement total using the configured fee rate when a settlement is processed.
- AC3: The `GET /settlements/:id` API response includes a `processingFee` field.
- AC4: The settlement list UI displays the processing fee alongside the settlement total.

## Edge Cases
- Fee is zero when the settlement total is zero.
- Fee calculation rounds to two decimal places using standard banker's rounding.

## Domain Events
- `SettlementFeeCalculated` — emitted after fee is applied to a settlement record.
